positive: A vibrant, stylized composition featuring a group of whimsical, ethereal woodland creatures—deer, fox, owl, and rabbit—gathering together in a bioluminescent forest clearing. The style is inspired by modern naive folk art and detailed botanical illustration, rendered with clean, thick outlines and solid color blocks. The forest setting has deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and pops of glowing amethyst and gold from glowing mushrooms and fireflies. The main characters are silhouetted against a magical, stylized moonrise. Highly detailed, clean vectors, suitable for apparel print, centralized composition, high contrast, ambient rim lighting, full saturation.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, low resolution, low detail, photographic, realistic
